/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/link.d -shared  -o _synthesus_kernel.cpython-313-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/kernel/pybind_module.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/kernel/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/kernel/message_bus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/kernel/memory_allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/reasoning/ppbrs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/reasoning/bayesian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/reasoning/causal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/reasoning/symbolic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/reasoning/sinn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/reasoning/planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/reasoning/ensemble_synth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/memory/working_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/memory/episodic_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/memory/long_term_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/memory/kn_database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/memory/self_perception.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/emotion_vcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/executive_vcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/language_vcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/memo_vcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/motor_vcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/perception_vcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/sensory_vcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/social_vcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/ct_vcu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/vcu/vpu_router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/automation/watchdog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/automation/telemetry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/core/ppbrs_router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/core/context_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/_synthesus_kernel.dir/core/hemi_reconciler.cpp.o
